cookieBanner.text: We use cookies to collect anonymized page views and improve our website. For more information, see our

datenschutzPage.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutzPage.votingIntro: When you participate in a poll on our website ("voting"), we process data to ensure the integrity of the vote.
datenschutzPage.processingText: Only when clicking the vote button, your IP address is collected, immediately combined with a "salt" (a secret additional key) and stored as a cryptographic hash.
datenschutzPage.retentionText: The hash is automatically deleted from our database after the voting round ends (by default after a maximum of 10 days).
datenschutzPage.legalBasisText: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (Legitimate interest in a manipulation-free vote).
datenschutzPage.analyticsIntro: If you give your consent through the cookie banner, we collect anonymized page views to understand and improve the use of our website.
datenschutzPage.analyticsProcessingText: With each page view, the page path, timestamp and any referral information is stored. No personal data such as IP addresses is stored.
datenschutzPage.analyticsPurposeText: Analysis of page usage to improve the offering.
datenschutzPage.revokeText: You can revoke your consent at any time by deleting the cookies in your browser or by revisiting our website and declining in the cookie banner.
datenschutzPage.rightsText: You have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and objection. Please contact us at the address given above.

streamplanPage.title: Stream Schedule
streamplanPage.intro: Here you can find the current stream schedule of HD1920x1080. Stay up to date on upcoming live streams and events!

streamelementsPage.title: Donations

moderate.forbiddenHint: This area is only accessible to moderators and the streamer.
moderate.modSyncHint: Fetches broadcaster + mods directly from the Twitch API. Requires a fresh login with moderation:read permission.

moderate.manualAddHintWithToken: Enter a Twitch username — the ID will be resolved automatically.
moderate.manualAddHintNoToken: Without an active sync login you can only enter numeric Twitch user IDs.
moderate.statisticsComingSoon: The statistics dashboard is being prepared… 📊
moderate.statisticsDescription: Overview of voting, traffic, and round data for moderation.
moderate.statisticsNoData: No data in the selected range.
